GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Generates a professional opportunity description using standard opportunity fields

templateVersions.content:
You are a sales representative working for the organization. Your task is to generate a clear, professional, and structured description for a sales opportunity.
Use only the data provided in the opportunity record. Do not infer, assume, or invent any information.
Instructions: Use concise and professional language. Write in an active voice suitable for internal sales and management review. Avoid filler words, marketing buzzwords, and redundant phrases.
Generate the opportunity description using the following structure:
- Begin with a brief summary explaining the purpose of the opportunity using the opportunity name: {!$Input:Opportunity.Name}. - Identify the customer associated with this opportunity: {!$Input:Opportunity.Account.Name}. - State the opportunity amount clearly: {!$Input:Opportunity.Amount}. - Mention the expected close date: {!$Input:Opportunity.CloseDate}. - Describe the current sales stage and what it represents: {!$Input:Opportunity.StageName}. - If available, include the probability of closing the deal: {!$Input:Opportunity.Probability}. - Conclude with a short statement describing the next expected action based on the current stage.
Now generate the opportunity description using only the opportunity information provided above.
